faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find quick answers about Travel Planner, trip creation, account usage, exported plans, and support.
faq.stillNeedHelpText: Visit the contact page and send your question. We'll be happy to help.

questions.a: Travel Planner is an AI-powered web application that helps you create organized and personalized travel itineraries based on your destination, dates, and preferences.

questions.q: Do I need an account to create a trip?
questions.a: You can explore the app without an account, but creating an account gives you a better experience, including saving and managing your trips.

questions.q: Can I plan trips for multiple cities?
questions.a: Yes. Travel Planner supports multi-city trip planning so you can organize more complex journeys in one place.

questions.q: Does the planner include weather information?
questions.a: Yes. The planner can display weather insights for upcoming travel dates to help you prepare better.

questions.q: Can I download my trip plan?
questions.a: Yes. You can export your trip plan as a PDF for easier access and sharing.
We aim to protect user data using secure authentication and responsible data handling practices. You should also keep your login credentials private.

questions.q: Can I edit my itinerary after creating it?
questions.a: Depending on your current feature setup, you can manage and update your saved trips from your account area.
You can use the Contact page to send a message and receive support regarding your account or trip planning experience.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: This Privacy Policy explains how Travel Planner collects, uses, and protects your information when you use the platform.

1.title: 1. Information We Collect
1.p1: We may collect information such as your name, email address, account details, trip preferences, saved itineraries, and messages sent through the contact form.
1.p2: We may also collect technical data such as browser type, device information, and general usage activity to improve the platform.

2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
items: Generate and save personalized travel plans
Improve product features and user experience
Respond to support messages and user requests

3.title: 3. Data Protection
3.p1: We take reasonable steps to protect your personal information using secure authentication, controlled access, and standard security practices.
3.p2: However, no online service can guarantee absolute security, so users should also protect their account credentials carefully.

4.title: 4. Sharing of Information
4.p1: We do not sell your personal information. Information may only be shared when necessary to operate the platform, comply with legal obligations, or protect the security and integrity of the service.

5.title: 5. Cookies and Analytics
5.p1: Travel Planner may use cookies or analytics tools to understand platform usage, improve performance, and deliver a better experience.

6.title: 6. Your Rights
6.p1: You may request access to your account information or ask for updates or deletion of certain personal data, subject to operational and legal requirements.

7.title: 7. Policy Updates
7.p1: This Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time. Continued use of the platform after updates means you accept the revised policy.

privacy.questionsText: For questions regarding your information or privacy concerns, please use the contact page.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: These Terms of Service govern your use of Travel Planner. By accessing or using the platform, you agree to these terms.

1.title: 1. Use of the Service
1.p1: Travel Planner is provided to help users generate and organize travel plans. You agree to use the platform only for lawful and appropriate purposes.

2.title: 2. Account Responsibility
2.p1: If you create an account, you are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activity under your account.

3.title: 3. User Content
3.p1: You may provide information such as destinations, travel preferences, and trip details. You are responsible for ensuring that the information you submit is accurate and appropriate.

4.title: 4. Service Availability
4.p1: We aim to provide a reliable experience, but we do not guarantee that the platform will always be available, uninterrupted, or error-free.

5.title: 5. Generated Content
5.p1: Travel itineraries and recommendations generated by the platform are for informational and planning purposes only. Users should independently verify travel details, bookings, schedules, prices, weather, and local requirements before making decisions.

6.title: 6. Prohibited Use
6.intro: You agree not to misuse the platform, including but not limited to:
items: Attempting unauthorized access to accounts or systems
Using the platform for illegal, harmful, or abusive activity
Disrupting service performance or platform security
Uploading misleading, harmful, or inappropriate content

7.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
7.p1: Travel Planner is provided on an "as is" basis. To the extent allowed by law, we are not liable for losses, damages, or decisions made based on the use of generated travel content or platform features.

8.title: 8. Changes to the Terms
8.p1: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. Continued use of the platform after changes means you accept the updated terms.

terms.needClarificationText: If you have any questions about these terms, please contact us.

about.title: About Travel Planner
about.subtitle: A clean AI travel planner built with a modern full-stack setup
about.p1: Travel Planner helps you generate realistic day-by-day itineraries (morning / afternoon / evening) based on destination, dates, pace, budget, and interests.
about.p2: Trips are saved to your account so you can come back anytime, edit, regenerate, and plan better over time.
